37/52. Tha MacÌomhair a' saoilsinn gum bi e na dheagh ghàirnealair ach tha e cho ceàrr sa ghabhas! MacÌomhair thinks that he will be a great gardener, but that is very much not the case!
5/26. The mice are preparing for their annual ball, which Célestine has been invited to for the first time.
12/52. Tha tubaist aig Uircean 's tha Pip a' cur plàstair air a gualainn goirt. Uircean has an accident and Pip puts a plaster on her sore shoulder.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 33/52. Abney, Teal and Neep make mysterious noises on a misty day. They try to get Bop to join in the game, but it's not so mysterious down by the lake.
13/26. Seal organises a swimming contest in the lake. Owl decides to sign up.

1/6. Archive music series featuring choirs and outstanding soloists. This episode features The London Gaelic Choir.
8/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.

programmes.show_description: 2/7. The journey continues to Nova Scotia via a vineyard on the edge of the Bras d'Or Lake.

programmes.show_description: 1/3. Niteworks and The BBC SSO collaborate in a performance at Glasgow Royal Concert Hall.
2/4. A look at the golden jackal - a shy predator, whose territory used to be in the Balkans.
1/2. Hoolie 2023. A' dèanamh moladh air Runrig. Le Mànran, Wolfstone, Trail West agus aoighean. Hoolie 2023 celebrates Runrig. Music from Mànran, Wolfstone, Trail West and guests.
25/30. Tom Walker a' lasadh Àrd-Ùrlar Hot House air an latha mu dheireadh aig Belladrum 2025. Tom Walker lights up the Hot House Stage on the final day at Belladrum. Contains strong language.

2/10. Linda visits Meaban and Moo with a challenge. Today, they must find shiny silver things.
14/52. Tha iomadh seòrs' ionnsramaid ga chluich an-diugh - fuaimneach, ach ceòlmhor cuideachd! There are lots of instruments being played today, noisy but also musical!
5/21. Phoenix eagerly joins in some Puffin Practice with Oona, Isabelle and Baba. Tha Phoenix, gun dàil a' gabhail pàirt ann am Practas nam Buthaid,còmhla ri Oona, Iseabail is Baba.
6/21. Oona and Baba go to the Secret Den to shelter from a thunderstorm. Tha Oona is Baba a' dol dhan t-Sadhbhaidh Dhìomhair gus fasgadh a ghabhail bhon stoirm.
9/15. Tha Sophie agus a caraidean a' bocadaich coltach ri crogall agus leumadair. Sophie and her friends dance like a crocodile and a dolphin.
19/104. An dèidh bhith aig a' phàirc, tha Bing a mothachadh nach eil Hoppity aige tuilleadh. After being at the park, Bing realises that he no longer has his Hoppity Voosh toy.
20/104. Tha Bing 's Flop a' cur romhpa a dhol air cuirm-chnuic ach tha an t-uisge a' tighinn. Bing and Flop prepare to go on a picnic, but then the rain arrives.
18/26. Tha Daolag-bhreac is Seillean a' cunntadh chasan an-diugh. Ladybird and Bee are counting legs today.
9/26. While the kids are racing outside, Petit's mum asks them to take care of Tina for a while.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 1/26. The Spuds take the camper van on holiday and end up at the bottom of the sea.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 2/26. Tha Pòl a' sàbhaladh aiseal a th' ann an cunnart shìos aig na docaichean. Dave rescues an endangered donkey from the docks.
12/13. Tha turas campaidh gus bhith ann is tha Hilda is Flòraidh a'  cur aithne air caraidean ùra. A camping trip is going to take place, and Hilda and Flòraidh make new acquaintances.
...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 44/52. Tha na Gumbalan 'g ionnsachadh mu Ghum Fu an-diugh. The Gumbalan are learning about Gum Fu today.

programmes.show_description: The story behind artist Ewen Bain's beloved Hebridean cartoon rascal. An sgeulachd air cùlaibh a' mheabain eileanach chartùn a chruthaich Eòghann Bain.
